NETWORK PRICING


Pricing built around your network.

Explore network solutions

Three factors define network cost.

01

Trading Partners

The number of organizations in your network.

02

Routing Logic

Where data moves and how it is orchestrated.

03

Deployment Model

Direct deployment or partner-led change.

See Network Challenges We Solve →

Network profiles


Built to scale with your supply chain.

Small
Starting at $299/mo.

Simple routing. Smaller networks.

Supply chains with smaller partner connectivity requirements.

Growing
Starting at $2,500/mo.

More partners. More moving parts.

Best for growing manufacturers and distributors.

No hidden fees. Connect to the Trust.med network without upfront implementation costs and expand your partner network as you grow.

Network solutions

What connectivity challenge are you facing?

We’ll design and scope the right approach.

Serial Numbers EPCIS ASN Master Data • AS2 SFTP API Portal
Selected challenges

Focused Need

You want to separate network connectivity from the rest of your supply chain stack.

Routing
This usually points to a design conversation around routing control, partner onboarding, and stack separation.

Direct or partner


Modernize your network.

Direct

Keep your stack. Own the network.

Your ERP, WMS, and L4 stay in place. Trust.med takes over the networking layer.

Partner

Change your stack. Own the network.

Best when you are replacing systems and want networking outside the new vendor.

Next step


Scope your network.
